creator: jaapb@kerguelen.org
text:
A new version of ocaml-calendar: 2.0.2.

For the moment, this port is not depended on by anything else, it seems, but for the record: ocaml-calendar 1 and ocaml-calendar 2 are API-incompatible.

Fix: shar included.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: n/a
